'Paws'itively Perfect Just The Way You Are- students will learn acceptance of others' differences by meeting Neville- my 3 legged dog! Students will hear a story about a 3 legged dog, meet a real 3 legged dog, discuss how our differences make us unique and create a tshirt rope toy for the dog in their life!

Paws & Wags: The English Lab Experience - Come meet Chief, Hank, Peggy, and Rocky—four incredibly friendly English Labs with calm demeanors and loving personalities! These sweet pups are gentle, affectionate, and always ready to make new friends. Whether you’re a lifelong dog lover or just need a little puppy happiness in your day, you won’t want to miss meeting this lovable crew! 🐾

Core 40 Academic Assistance - Extra help for Core 40 Geometry students.
Geometry Academic Assistance - Extra help for Geometry students.
AP 2D support and work time: If you are in Miss Strawhacker's AP 2D class, you are encouraged to attend.
Marble, Stick and Yarn Painting: Explore the fun and freedom of painting with non-traditional tools on large paper.

Crochet Time for EXPERIENCED Crocheters: EXPERIENCED crocheters will choose their own projects. No instruction will be provided. Yarn and crochet hooks are available, or participants are welcome to provide their own and bring their own projects if they'd like.

Work Time and Support for Strawhacker's Current Art Students: If you are currently enrolled in a class taught by Miss Strawhacker, you are welcome to attend and use this time to complete projects and/or gain support from her.
Expressive Dramatic Portrait Collage: Create dramatic or silly portraits in cut paper while playing with proportion, pattern, texture + color. Add a scene and tell a story if you like!
Yarn Wall Decor Art: Wind, tie, weave and knot yarn on cardboard or stick structures resulting in art to adorn your wall!

The Reading Lounge: A Chill Escape with Books & Beats Need a break from the noise of the day? Step into the Reading Lounge—a cozy, low-key space designed for quiet reading and relaxed vibes. Bring a book (or grab one here), settle in, and enjoy a calm atmosphere with thoughtfully chosen music playing in the background. Whether you want to get lost in a story, catch up on reading, or just enjoy some peaceful time, this is your spot to unwind and recharge.

title: Paws & Wags: The English Lab Experience - Come meet Chief, Hank, Peggy, and Rocky—four incredibly friendly English Labs with calm demeanors and loving personalities! Whether you’re a lifelong dog lover or just need a little puppy happiness in your day, you won’t want to miss meeting this lovable crew!

Board Games : Step into a classroom where stories and strategy collide. Whether you’re a beginner or a seasoned board gamer, you can jump into a game from our classroom collection or bring your own and play for one session or stay for multiple rounds. Just like the best works of fiction, every game has characters, conflict, and unexpected twists—so come ready to think, collaborate, and have fun.

HSE Ag Adventure - Students will participate in HSE Ag Adventure by rotating through four fun, hands-on agriculture stations. During the experience, students will learn about different agriculture commodities while playing bingo in the classroom, practice roping and “milking” a model cow and take a photo on a tractor outside, plant seeds in the greenhouse, and participate in an agriculture-themed bingo activity. These rotations are designed to give students an engaging introduction to agriculture and where their food and fiber come from.
